parameters.formDescription: Internal test intake for MKT-06 content creation and dissemination.

parameters.content:
# MKT-06 - Content Creation & Dissemination

Safe v1 n8n template converted from the repo kit. This workflow uses internal-test defaults and placeholder handoff nodes. Wire service credentials only after each checkpoint has a validation test and fallback path.

parameters.jsonOutput:
{
  "workflow_id": "MKT-06",
  "workflow_name": "Content Creation & Dissemination",
  "run_mode": "internal_canary",
  "canary_id": "WF6-CANARY-LOCAL",
  "status": "intake_received",
  "brief": {
    "title": "WF6 Canary Test - Internal Verification",
    "slug": "wf6-canary-test-internal-verification",
    "primary_keyword": "ai native content engine",
    "target_persona": "Founder/operator validating URC workflow packaging",
    "channel_targets": ["blog", "email", "linkedin", "instagram"],
    "content_format": "Blog",
    "publish_date": "2026-05-12",
    "internal_test_only": true
  },
  "safety": {
    "allow_live_email_send": false,
    "allow_live_sms_send": false,
    "allow_external_publish": false,
    "requires_human_approval_before_distribution": true
  }
}

{
  "checkpoint": "01_notion_planning_item",
  "system_of_record": "Notion Content Calendar",
  "status": "placeholder_ready",
  "required_evidence": ["Notion page URL", "owner", "publish date", "channel targets"],
  "next_live_node": "Notion: create or update content calendar item",
  "manual_fallback": "Create the Notion row manually using assets/notion-content-calendar-schema.md"
}

{
  "checkpoint": "02_jira_ticket",
  "system_of_record": "Jira",
  "status": "placeholder_ready",
  "required_statuses": ["To Do", "In Progress", "In Review", "Approved", "SEO Complete", "Adaptation Complete", "Published"],
  "next_live_node": "Jira: create issue and update transitions",
  "manual_fallback": "Create a Jira ticket manually and capture ticket URL plus status history"
}

{
  "checkpoint": "03_source_draft",
  "system_of_record": "Google Docs or OneDrive",
  "status": "placeholder_ready",
  "required_evidence": ["draft URL or file path", "linked Jira ticket", "linked Notion item"],
  "next_live_node": "Microsoft 365 or Google Docs: create draft from approved brief",
  "manual_fallback": "Create the draft in OneDrive/Word and paste the link into the evidence log"
}

{
  "checkpoint": "04_github_artifact",
  "system_of_record": "GitHub content repo",
  "status": "placeholder_ready",
  "branch_pattern": "content/{ticket-id}/{slug}",
  "next_live_node": "GitHub: create branch and commit content artifact",
  "manual_fallback": "Commit or attach the artifact manually and capture branch, commit SHA, or PR URL"
}

{
  "checkpoint": "05_editorial_approval",
  "system_of_record": "Teams or Notion comments",
  "status": "human_gate_required",
  "max_revision_cycles": 2,
  "next_live_node": "Teams: request editorial review and capture approval",
  "manual_fallback": "Record reviewer, timestamp, and approval outcome in the evidence log"
}

{
  "checkpoint": "06_seo_complete",
  "system_of_record": "Confluence or Notion SEO report",
  "status": "placeholder_ready",
  "onpage_seo_score_target": 85,
  "next_live_node": "SEO agent or checklist: generate optimization report",
  "manual_fallback": "Run the SEO checklist manually and capture score plus report URL"
}

{
  "checkpoint": "07_adaptation",
  "system_of_record": "Drive, OneDrive, or GitHub adaptations folder",
  "status": "placeholder_ready",
  "minimum_channel_adaptations": 4,
  "preferred_canary_variants": ["email", "linkedin"],
  "next_live_node": "AI adaptation agent: create channel-specific assets",
  "manual_fallback": "Create at least one email variant and one social variant manually"
}

{
  "checkpoint": "08_klaviyo_preview",
  "system_of_record": "Klaviyo",
  "status": "distribution_hold",
  "preview_list_id": "XbByas",
  "allow_live_send": false,
  "next_live_node": "Klaviyo: create preview campaign only",
  "manual_fallback": "Create a Klaviyo preview or screenshot draft campaign before any live send"
}

{
  "checkpoint": "09_step7_tracker_row",
  "system_of_record": "Notion Content Performance Tracker",
  "status": "placeholder_ready",
  "review_offsets_days": [7, 30],
  "scorecard": "assets/seven-point-scorecard.md",
  "next_live_node": "Notion: create performance tracker row and schedule Day-7/Day-30 checks",
  "manual_fallback": "Create the tracker row manually and document any missing metrics"
}

{
  "checkpoint": "10_final_decision",
  "system_of_record": "MKT-06 canary evidence log",
  "status": "ready_for_review",
  "allowed_decisions": ["Pass", "Pass with Manual Workarounds", "Fail"],
  "go_no_go_required_evidence": ["Jira proof", "draft proof", "distribution proof", "Step 7 tracking proof"],
  "recommended_decision_for_template_run": "Pass with Manual Workarounds",
  "next_step": "Replace placeholders with live n8n service nodes one checkpoint at a time"
}
